# Sepehr Mahmoudian

> AI/ML engineer in Berlin, Germany. Builds agentic systems; works across
> continual learning, knowledge graphs and retrieval-augmented generation (RAG),
> with roots in computational neuroscience, information theory, neurorobotics and
> 3D vision. Primary languages: Rust and Python. Building on GitHub since 2014.

## Focus
Agentic engineering, continual learning, knowledge graphs, RAG, world models,
neural networks, spiking neural networks, neurorobotics, information theory, computational
neuroscience, 3D vision and scene reconstruction, robotics, drone detection,
sensor fusion and airspace awareness.

## Selected work
- NCP (Neuro-Cybernetic Protocol): safety-gated, provenance-first wire protocol that lets a spiking neural simulation (NEST) perceive and act through robots, UAVs and analysis clients; Rust SDK with Python, C/C++ and TypeScript peers: https://github.com/sepahead/NCP
- crebain: Airspace Research & Awareness System (ARAS); a research prototype for detailed multi-UAV simulation and airspace situational awareness: multi-modal sensor fusion (KF/EKF/UKF/PF/IMM tracking), ML drone detection, 120 Hz drone physics, ROS/Gazebo; Tauri + React + Rust: https://github.com/sepahead/crebain
- melkor: Gaussian-splatting & depth-analysis pipelines for 3D scene reconstruction; multi-view capture to dense geometry, CUDA-accelerated (Python/C++): https://github.com/sepahead/melkor
- cortexel: agent-consumable scientific-visualization library for neural simulations; an agent emits a declarative VizSpec and Cortexel renders spike rasters, Brunel networks and STDP curves, with provenance enforced fail-closed (TypeScript): https://github.com/sepahead/cortexel
- pid-rs: Partial Information Decomposition with continuous mutual-information (KSG) estimators, in safe Rust: https://github.com/sepahead/pid-rs
- cobot-atlas: 3D mesh-generation pipeline; 2,023 meshes for collaborative-robot simulation and embodied AI (Python): https://github.com/sepahead/cobot-atlas — dataset on Hugging Face (DOI 10.57967/hf/9199): https://huggingface.co/datasets/torusprime/cobot-atlas
- manwe: real-time UAV detection from vision in safe Rust; a camera feed to low-latency airspace awareness, feeding crebain: https://github.com/sepahead/manwe
- engram: Engram Neural Modeling Labs; NEST-based neural-modeling hub (the "brain" the rest of the stack connects to); code opens fully after publication: https://github.com/sepahead/engram
- haldir: security & guardian layer for the NCP ecosystem (design catalog): per-frame sensor provenance, fail-closed authorization gates, attestation and cross-sensor integrity for UAVs and embodied agents: https://github.com/sepahead/haldir
- prisoma (private): a prism for embodied agents, robotics and world models; refracts Vision-Language-Action policies through several natively-implemented analysis methods, Partial Information Decomposition among them
- galadriel (private): Galadriel's Mirror; cross-sensor spoof detection via Partial Information Decomposition, watching crebain's sensor fusion (Rust)

## More repositories
- brojapid-activationfunctions: Partial Information Decomposition (PID) analysis of neural-network activation functions: https://github.com/sepahead/brojapid-activationfunctions
- nest-simulator: NEST simulator fork with original contributions: https://github.com/sepahead/nest-simulator
- relief-atlas: 10K+ AI-generated 3D mesh assets for disaster relief: https://github.com/sepahead/relief-atlas
- silmaril-vision-studio: computer-vision studio and testbed: https://github.com/sepahead/silmaril-vision-studio

## Research & writing
- ReScience C replication: information-theoretic analysis of transfer functions: https://github.com/sepahead/mahmoudian-2020-rescience
- Google Scholar: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=t3PSg8kAAAAJ
- Substack: https://substack.com/@torusprime
